phase_statuses.claim: gap scope and non-goal governance passed
stable bayesfilter.highdim score API contract passed; root public API remains blocked
low-dimensional native generalized SV dense reference passed for value and gradient refinement
spatial SIR production route preflight completed; production route remains blocked by architecture
declared horizon-25 predator-prey production tuning row passed preserved P47/P50 tolerances
scoped Tier 2 leapfrog diagnostics passed for exact transformed SV dim-1 target
same-target Tier 3 short-chain diagnostic blocked by posterior/reference veto
smoothing remains deferred as a future latent-path inference target
integration closeout reconciles P51 closures, blockers, non-goals, and nonclaims

original_gap_dispositions.boundary: CUT4/Zhao-Cui native generalized SV equality and production generalized SV readiness remain unclaimed.
Route preflight passed, but production spatial SIR remains blocked by all-axes retained-grid architecture.
Only the declared horizon-25 additive-Gaussian RK4 row is closed; no HMC or native non-Gaussian predator-prey claim is made.
Tier 2 leapfrog passed for the scoped exact transformed SV dim-1 target; Tier 3 short-chain blocked, so HMC readiness is not established.
Stable bayesfilter.highdim score API passed; root-level bayesfilter public score API remains BLOCKED_PUBLIC_API_DECISION.
Smoothing is deferred unless latent-path inference becomes a separate reviewed program.

remaining_blockers.next_smallest_action: design a streamed or factorized transition application that avoids materializing all grid-pair transitions
construct an adequate posterior reference support and rerun same-target short-chain diagnostics without loosening criteria
separate public API policy decision before exporting score API at root bayesfilter
create a latent-path inference/smoothing master program if smoothing becomes a target

supported_claims: P51 preserves adaptive TT/SIRT source-faithful filtering and S&P 500 reproduction as non-goals, not gaps
bayesfilter.highdim has a stable subpackage score API contract; root-level bayesfilter public score API remains blocked
native generalized SV now has a low-dimensional dense same-target reference for value and gradient refinement
spatial SIR production route blocker is narrowed to a concrete route-architecture problem
predator-prey declared horizon-25 production tuning row passes preserved P47/P50 tolerances
HMC Tier 2 leapfrog diagnostics pass for a scoped exact transformed SV dim-1 target
HMC Tier 3 short-chain diagnostics are blocked on posterior/reference evidence, so HMC readiness is not established
smoothing remains a future latent-path target with enforced backward-field requirements
nonclaims: no stable root-level bayesfilter score API
